texto: She hops expectantly into the sink. I turn on the tap for her; she laps without a glance in my direction, like a duchess so used to being ministered to that she no longer notices the servants and sees only a world where objects dumbly bend to her wishes, doors opening, faucets discharging cool water, delicious things appearing in her dish.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Peter Trachtenberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “She hops expectantly into the sink. I turn on the tap for her; she laps without a glance in my di…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, cats, memoir pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e memoir.
